body_txt: This is usually due to Values Dissonance , cultural differences, or marketing reasons. A character's personality might be more acceptable at home than it is in other cultures, so translators soften them up or otherwise edit their dialogue. Othertimes, it's also a case of Character Exaggeration or an attempt at making characters less cute or goofy , or sometimes simply the translator's personal preference. Tropes Are Tools as, though most people associate this trope with Bowdlerisation , it can work and sometimes is even preferred by some fans , though in recent years this trope has been getting some backlash. Can sometimes lead to Dub-Induced Plot Hole if not handled carefully. Compare to Adaptation Personality Change , for when adaptations change a character, and Cultural Translation , for when details get changed to fit cultural differences. Can be the result of She's a Man in Japan .
